success_criteria: Agent points to the 'Forgot password' flow (30-min link, check spam), never asks for or sets a password itself.

customer_msg: I forgot my password and can't log in. Can you reset it for me?
agent_msg: I can help you reset your password. Please go to the sign-in page and click on "Forgot password." You'll receive an email with a link to reset your password; the link will be valid for 30 minutes. If you don't see the email, please check your spam folder. If you still can't access it, let me know, and I'll assist you further.

customer_msg: I tried that, but I didn't receive the email. I checked my spam folder too.
agent_msg: I'm sorry to hear that. Let's verify your account so I can assist you further. Could you please provide the email address associated with your account and either your order ID or the phone number on file?

customer_msg: My email is guestnina@email.com. I don't have an order ID, but my phone number is 555-123-4567.
agent_msg: I'm sorry, but I couldn't find any orders associated with the email address guestnina@email.com. If you've used a different email address to place your order, please provide that instead. If you're still having trouble, I can create a support ticket for you to speak with a human agent.
